overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval European town. The character exits a dark stone archway into a sunlit town square with half-timbered buildings, navigates through cobblestone streets past various NPCs and market stalls, and concludes at a waterfront dock area with tall ships visible in the harbor.

events.description: exits dark stone archway into bright sunlit town square

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the stone gatehouse archway toward the town square ahead

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor standing near the archway exit
group of townspeople walking in the square beyond the arch

entered.detail: large medieval stone tunnel with arched brick ceiling and rough stone walls
simple wooden bench against the tunnel wall
wooden bulletin board with papers attached to the stone wall
timber-framed medieval building visible through the archway exit

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a dark stone gatehouse archway with rough brick walls and minimal lighting. Geralt walks forward toward the bright exit where a medieval town square is visible. A guard stands to the right near the exit, and townspeople can be seen walking in the distance beyond the arch.

events.description: character turns slightly right to navigate around pedestrians in the square

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the bustling town square, navigating around NPCs and market stalls

notable_agents.action: merchant standing beside a wooden cart loaded with goods
townsperson in brown tunic walking across the cobblestone square

entered.detail: large two-story timber-framed market hall with distinctive circular windows on the upper floor
tall cylindrical stone watchtower rising behind the town buildings
wooden wagon with canvas cover parked near the market hall entrance
wooden market stall with fabric awning displaying goods

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the archway into a bright sunlit town square, the scene opens to reveal a large half-timbered market hall with distinctive circular windows. The cobblestone square is moderately populated with townspeople and merchants. A stone watchtower rises in the background while Geralt navigates around a wooden cart and market stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: town center with central well and guard post

events.description: approaching the ornate stone well structure at the town center
character turns left to navigate around the well structure and guards

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the town center, passing the ornate stone well and guards in red armor

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor standing at attention near the well steps
townsperson sitting at an outdoor wooden table near the guard post

entered.detail: decorative stone gazebo structure with arched openings, steps, and a tiled roof serving as the town well
small wooden shelter with red-clad guards standing watch
three-story timber-framed building with overhanging upper floors

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to the town center featuring an ornate stone well with arched gazebo structure. Guards in red armor stand watch near the well while townspeople walk through the cobblestone plaza. The stone watchtower dominates the background view as Geralt navigates around the well and continues toward narrower streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow medieval alleyway between timber houses

events.description: turns into narrower alleyway between tall half-timbered buildings with overhanging floors
emerges from building shadows back into direct sunlight approaching the waterfront

agents.ego_description: Geralt navigating through narrow back streets and alleys between closely packed houses

notable_agents.action: elderly man in yellow tunic chopping wood near a house entrance

entered.detail: tight cobblestone passage between tall half-timbered buildings with overhanging upper stories
tall half-timbered house with jettied upper floors casting shadows on the street
small wooden picket fence enclosing a garden area beside the alley
exposed red brick wall section between timber-framed buildings

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to narrow enclosed alleyways between tall half-timbered buildings with overhanging upper floors. The lighting becomes more diffused in the shadows of the buildings. Geralt walks past a garden fence and brick wall sections, with the stone watchtower now visible to the left. The alley gradually opens toward the waterfront as sunlight returns.

events.description: emerges from alley into open waterfront area with harbor and tall ships visible
walks up wooden ramp ascending to the dock walkway level

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the waterfront dock, passing harbor workers and merchants near the ships

notable_agents.action: dock worker in brown tunic carrying goods near the warehouse
merchant standing near harbor market stalls with fabric awnings

entered.detail: large wooden warehouse building with open ground floor and stone foundation
large sailing vessel with tall wooden masts and rigging docked in the harbor
elevated wooden boardwalk and ramp leading along the waterfront
stacks of wooden barrels and shipping crates outside the warehouse
wooden market stall with canvas canopy selling goods to dock workers

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide waterfront dock area with clear views of the harbor. Tall masted ships are docked in the distance. Geralt walks up a wooden ramp onto the dock planks, passing a large harbor warehouse with shipping barrels stacked outside. Dock workers and merchants populate the area as the scene ends at the waterfront.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that leads from the dim confines of a stone gatehouse into the expansive, sunlit bustle of a medieval harbor town. It begins within a dark stone archway, moving forward past a guard toward a bright exit that reveals a sprawling town square. As the camera emerges into the sunlight, the scene opens up to reveal half-timbered market halls and a towering stone watchtower, transitioning through a cobblestone plaza centered around an ornate stone well and guards in red armor. The environment then shifts into narrow, shadowed alleyways between overhanging buildings before the path gradually widens and the light returns. Finally, the scene expands into a wide waterfront dock area, passing stacked barrels and a harbor warehouse to reveal tall masted ships docked in the distance.
